top_signals.title: PBOC Adviser Sees Potential Rate Cut
top_signals.summary: Huang Yiping, a member of the monetary policy committee at the People’s Bank of China, says he sees a potential rate cut this year. He joined Bloomberg's Minmin Low on the sidelines of the World Economic Forum in Dalian and appeared on Insight with Haslinda Amin. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Tuya Sees Growth Despite China Demand Slowdown
top_signals.summary: Tuya Smart, an AI cloud and IoT platform provider, says growth remains strong despite slowing consumer appliance demand in China. Co-founder and COO, Alex Young, joined Bloomberg's Minmin Low on the sidelines of the World Economic Forum in Dalian and appeared on Insight with Haslinda Amin. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: McKinsey’s Ngai on China's 'Opportunity 2.0'
top_signals.summary: McKinsey Greater China Chairman, Joe Ngai, says China's “Opportunity 2.0” narrative is gaining prominence as innovation, consumption, and advanced manufacturing reshape its growth outlook. He joined Bloomberg's Minmin Low on the sidelines of the World Economic Forum in Dalian and appeared on Insight with Haslinda Amin. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Morgan Stanley doubles China humanoid robot shipment forecast as commercialization accelerates
top_signals.summary: Morgan Stanley has sharply raised its outlook for China's humanoid robotics market, as early commercial deployment in real-world scenarios accelerated.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
